creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Sergio Carlavilla Delgado from comment #11)

Thanks, I had already begun work in a bug-270229-gpl branch in GitHub, I'll pause. 

% git -C /usr/doc log --oneline -n 4
5ca71c5f09 (HEAD -> bug-270229-gpl, origin/bug-270229-gpl) copyright/: GNU and GNU Library: .txt
892bf92287 Rename COPYING.LIB to GNU-Library-GPL-v2-199106.txt
4d45290537 Rename COPYING to GNU-GPL-v2-199106.txt
1d52bc22a7 (origin/main, origin/HEAD, freebsd/main, main) Remove invalid ports copyright link
%
